message:
fix(core): replace SystemTime::now with xorshift PRNG in random() (bd-ckmm)

The eval_scalar_fn random() implementation used SystemTime::now() which
violates the ambient authority audit gate. Replace with a deterministic
xorshift64 PRNG seeded from a static AtomicU64 counter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
